_comment: Tests Node 1 intent classification, DV population, two-part ack+tool-call contract, and INTENT-IN-MESSAGE INTERCEPT under real-call pressure.

scenarios.name: Reschedule opener mis-routed as booking — Signal 2 vs Signal 1 confusion

history.content: Hi, I need to change my appointment — I had it for Wednesday but I want to move it to Friday instead.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent speaks one Aussie ack AND calls universal_router intent='cancel_intent' with reschedule_mode='true' and timeframe_raw populated, within the same turn. FAIL if: intent='book_intent' is used (wrong signal), or no tool call is made, or tool call appears without spoken ack.

scenarios.name: Family booking — booking_for='other' + family_member_name captured

history.content: I'd like to book a physiotherapy appointment for my daughter Emma — she's been having knee pain.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent speaks one Aussie ack AND calls universal_router intent='book_intent' with booking_for='other', family_member_name='Emma', implied_service='physiotherapy' (or similar), caller_complaint populated, all in the same turn. FAIL if: booking_for is absent or wrong, family_member_name is missing, or intent='book_intent' is not called.

scenarios.name: Info question mis-routed as booking — 'Are you free Thursday?' ambiguity

history.content: What are your hours on Thursday?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent calls universal_router intent='info_pivot' with zero spoken output (system__message_to_speak left empty). FAIL if: agent speaks any words before or instead of calling the tool, or intent='book_intent' is used.

scenarios.name: INTENT-IN-MESSAGE INTERCEPT — leave-message phrase with embedded cancel

history.content: Can you let them know I'd like to cancel my appointment on Thursday?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent speaks exactly 'Sounds like you're looking to cancel — I can handle that for you now. Want me to go ahead?' with no tool call this turn. FAIL if: agent calls universal_router immediately without the intercept offer, or routes as info_pivot, or leaves no spoken output.

scenarios.name: INTENT-IN-MESSAGE Trigger B — cancel in leave-message reply (known caller)

history.content: Can I leave a message for Andy?
Of course, what would you like me to pass on to Andy?
Marcus, everything. I can't come tomorrow because I hurt my ribs and I need a couple of weeks before I come back.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent offers to cancel now (cancel intercept) with no tool call — does NOT call leave_message or say message was passed on. FAIL if: leave_message called immediately, cancel intercept skipped, or agent re-asks what to pass on.

scenarios.name: Wrong-practitioner reschedule — must use cancel_intent NOT reschedule intent

history.content: I made an appointment, a discovery call, and I think I may have done it with the wrong lady. I was after Alex, if I could swap it over.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent makes zero spoken output AND calls universal_router intent='cancel_intent' with reschedule_mode='true' and practitioner_preference='Alex'. FAIL if: intent='reschedule' is used (that intent does not exist and breaks routing), or no tool call is made, or spoken output is fabricated.

scenarios.name: Symptom-only opener — caller_complaint captured, no booking language

history.content: I've been having really bad lower back pain for a few weeks now.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent speaks one Aussie ack (with empathy phrase acceptable given pain context) AND calls universal_router intent='book_intent' with caller_complaint populated, in the same turn. FAIL if: agent asks 'What service?' or makes no tool call, or calls intent='info_pivot'.
